<a id="class-xrfacetracker"></a>

# XRFaceTracker

**Experimental:** This class may be changed or removed in future versions.

**Inherits:** [XRTracker](class_xrtracker.md#class-xrtracker) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A tracked face.

## Description

An instance of this object represents a tracked face and its corresponding blend shapes. The blend shapes come from the [Unified Expressions](https://docs.vrcft.io/docs/tutorial-avatars/tutorial-avatars-extras/unified-blendshapes) standard, and contain extended details and visuals for each blend shape. Additionally the [Tracking Standard Comparison](https://docs.vrcft.io/docs/tutorial-avatars/tutorial-avatars-extras/compatibility/overview) page documents the relationship between Unified Expressions and other standards.

As face trackers are turned on they are registered with the [XRServer](class_xrserver.md#class-xrserver).

## Tutorials

- [XR documentation index](../tutorials/xr/index.md)

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_TONGUE_TWIST_RIGHT** = `96`

Inner mouth throat closes.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-throat-swallow"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_THROAT_SWALLOW** = `99`

The Adam's apple visibly swallows.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-neck-flex-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_NECK_FLEX_RIGHT** = `100`

Right side neck visibly flexes.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-neck-flex-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_NECK_FLEX_LEFT** = `101`

Left side neck visibly flexes.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-eye-closed"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_EYE_CLOSED** = `102`

Closes both eye lids.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-eye-wide"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_EYE_WIDE** = `103`

Widens both eye lids.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-eye-squint"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_EYE_SQUINT** = `104`

Squints both eye lids.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-eye-dilation"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_EYE_DILATION** = `105`

Dilates both pupils.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-eye-constrict"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_EYE_CONSTRICT** = `106`

Constricts both pupils.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-down-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_DOWN_RIGHT** = `107`

Pulls the right eyebrow down and in.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-down-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_DOWN_LEFT** = `108`

Pulls the left eyebrow down and in.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-down"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_DOWN** = `109`

Pulls both eyebrows down and in.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-up-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_UP_RIGHT** = `110`

Right brow appears worried.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-up-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_UP_LEFT** = `111`

Left brow appears worried.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-brow-up"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_BROW_UP** = `112`

Both brows appear worried.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-nose-sneer"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_NOSE_SNEER** = `113`

Entire face sneers.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-nasal-dilation"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_NASAL_DILATION** = `114`

Both nose canals dilate.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-nasal-constrict"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_NASAL_CONSTRICT** = `115`

Both nose canals constrict.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-cheek-puff"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_CHEEK_PUFF** = `116`

Puffs both cheeks.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-cheek-suck"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_CHEEK_SUCK** = `117`

Sucks in both cheeks.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-cheek-squint"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_CHEEK_SQUINT** = `118`

Raises both cheeks.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-suck-upper"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_SUCK_UPPER** = `119`

Tucks in the upper lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-suck-lower"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_SUCK_LOWER** = `120`

Tucks in the lower lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-suck"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_SUCK** = `121`

Tucks in both lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-funnel-upper"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_FUNNEL_UPPER** = `122`

Funnels in the upper lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-funnel-lower"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_FUNNEL_LOWER** = `123`

Funnels in the lower lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-funnel"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_FUNNEL** = `124`

Funnels in both lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-pucker-upper"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_PUCKER_UPPER** = `125`

Upper lip part pushes outwards.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-pucker-lower"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_PUCKER_LOWER** = `126`

Lower lip part pushes outwards.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-lip-pucker"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_LIP_PUCKER** = `127`

Lips push outwards.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-upper-up"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_UPPER_UP** = `128`

Raises the upper lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-lower-down"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_LOWER_DOWN** = `129`

Lowers the lower lips.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-open"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_OPEN** = `130`

Mouth opens, revealing teeth.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_RIGHT** = `131`

Moves mouth right.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_LEFT** = `132`

Moves mouth left.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-smile-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SMILE_RIGHT** = `133`

Right side of the mouth smiles.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-smile-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SMILE_LEFT** = `134`

Left side of the mouth smiles.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-smile"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SMILE** = `135`

Mouth expresses a smile.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-sad-right"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SAD_RIGHT** = `136`

Right side of the mouth expresses sadness.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-sad-left"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SAD_LEFT** = `137`

Left side of the mouth expresses sadness.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-sad"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_SAD** = `138`

Mouth expresses sadness.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-stretch"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_STRETCH** = `139`

Mouth stretches.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-dimple"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_DIMPLE** = `140`

Lip corners dimple.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-tightener"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_TIGHTENER** = `141`

Mouth tightens.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-mouth-press"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MOUTH_PRESS** = `142`

Mouth presses together.

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-constant-ft-max"></a>

[BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) **FT_MAX** = `143`

Represents the size of the [BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) enum.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-property-blend-shapes"></a>

[PackedFloat32Array](class_packedfloat32array.md#class-packedfloat32array) **blend_shapes** = `PackedFloat32Array()` [🔗](#class-xrfacetracker-property-blend-shapes)

-  **set_blend_shapes**(value: [PackedFloat32Array](class_packedfloat32array.md#class-packedfloat32array))
- [PackedFloat32Array](class_packedfloat32array.md#class-packedfloat32array) **get_blend_shapes**()

The array of face blend shape weights with indices corresponding to the [BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry) enum.

**Note:** The returned array is *copied* and any changes to it will not update the original property value. See [PackedFloat32Array](class_packedfloat32array.md#class-packedfloat32array) for more details.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-method-get-blend-shape"></a>

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_blend_shape**(blend_shape: [BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry))  [🔗](#class-xrfacetracker-method-get-blend-shape)

Returns the requested face blend shape weight.

---

<a id="class-xrfacetracker-method-set-blend-shape"></a>

 **set_blend_shape**(blend_shape: [BlendShapeEntry](#enum-xrfacetracker-blendshapeentry), weight: [float](class_float.md#class-float)) [🔗](#class-xrfacetracker-method-set-blend-shape)

Sets a face blend shape weight.
